# Copilot Instructions

## Lessons Learned Logging

At the end of every response, append a "Lessons Learned" section to `AI-HISTORY.md` in the root of this repo. Record:

- **What worked**: approaches, tools, or patterns that succeeded.
- **What failed**: mistakes, dead ends, or incorrect assumptions.
- **Why decisions were made**: rationale behind chosen approaches.

Guidelines:

- At the start of every new task, read `AI-HISTORY.md` first to avoid repeating mistakes and to build on past successes.
- Keep entries concise, factual, and focused on actionable insights.
- Reflect on your own performance and note areas for improvement.
- When `AI-HISTORY.md` exceeds ~15,000 tokens, summarize key insights and remove older entries to keep the file focused on recent learnings.
- Each entry should include a date header (ISO format) and a brief task description.
